phase_name: Corporate hardening + folder cleanup + final freeze
process_label: PARTIAL: Phase 19 completed but baseline/sector results weakened the claim
scientific_verdict: corporate signal survives but is weaker than simple baselines
final_classification: LOCKED / research-grade SEC public-company extension / not production / worth preserving

anchor_refresh.structural_distress_mean_percentile: 56–62 (above 50th-percentile chance line; too small N for statistical claim)
anchor_refresh.verdict: directional consistency with Phase 18; descriptive only; no statistical claim

sector_stratification.verdict: broadly distributed across reliable cells; pooled AUROC sits in mid-range; signal is not concentrated in a single sector but Manufacturing-3 is meaningfully weaker than the pooled headline

calibration.headline_finding: Watch band (80–95) is the most informative monitoring tier (lift 2.60×, recall 39%); Critical band (top 1%) shows tail dropoff (lift 0.37×) and is noise-prone — NOT highest-priority.

baseline_comparison.uncomfortable_finding: Two single-primitive baselines (operating cash flow / assets, interest coverage) slightly outperform the composite on AUROC. The composite's value is robustness/architecture, not raw discrimination.
baseline_comparison.implication: The corporate A/G composite is informationally consistent with the strongest single G primitives; its added value is graceful degradation when one primitive is missing, not maximum AUROC.

divergence_anchor.anchor_kind: internal future-state (G drops by ≥ 1 z over 1–2 yrs OR firm enters pre-petition)
divergence_anchor.headline_finding: Within the divergence-state cohort, the divergence/masking geometry AUROC = 0.705 beats structural distress (0.666) and joint-collapse severity (0.468 chance). The 36-pp swing between cohorts is first internal evidence supporting canonical R for its intended divergence/masking regime.
divergence_anchor.caveat: Internal future-state anchor; NOT external divergence-event anchor. External validation deferred.

next_recommended_focus: Higher-ed Task #15 (A-layer + multi-year panel + closure/HCM anchor join). Corporate Phase 20 only if reviewer/audience requires; highest-marginal-value candidate is external divergence-anchor validation.
